title: スプリンターズSの後に・オー！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! I... lost?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Where did my Bakushin speed go? Is my name
only Sakura O?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...B-but!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I wasn't prepared for this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To think there was someone out there that could
beat my speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower... I heard she was fast, but I didn't think she was that fast!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Argh! At this rate, she'll take my place as
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I don't want to lose my job!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're right about that! They say the faster you
get, the more people will respect you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If that's what you want, I can do it! For my speed
was blessed by the heavens!
choice_data_list:
Next time around, let's beat Nishino Flower by
a bunch!

Next time around, let's beat Nishino Flower by
a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, does that mean I'll still be doing sprints?!
choice_data_list: Yes, let's perfect our sprint training.
Yes, let's perfect our sprint training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So if I win, I get to move to the next stage. Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like the Sprinters Stakes, it's another
1,200-meter G1 race. If Nishino Flower's aiming
to become a sprinter, I'm confident in saying she
will try her hand at it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Roger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! I'm getting all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Good running today, Bakushin O. I've come to
say my hellos—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, yes?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Your neck!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: My neck?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Scrub your neck clean, because next time I'll be
at your throat! Can't have it tasting all weird! I
won't be losing again!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-scrub? Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our sights on the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!
